text: Today I'm craving fresh coconut water, so let's go get some. It wasn't long before I came across this tree that had quite a few of them up there, so I kicked off my shoes and went over to try and climb it. Today I'm filming on my Meta Ray Band so you guys can get a unique perspective as I climb up and grab these coconuts. And just like that, we have our coconuts. Back at the house, I just went ahead and cut open the coconut, poked a hole in the top and added in our straw. Time to see how it tastes, exactly what I was craving. Now I'm going to enjoy the rest of my coconut and until next time, get outside and see what you can find.

Now I'm going to enjoy the rest of my coconut and until next time, get outside and see what you can find.
